The enterprise genomics platform

Helix transforms health systems and enables life science organizations to leverage the power of genomics across their enterprise, creating strategic value and fueling future growth.

Helix Research Network

Accelerate genomic discoveries and drive real-world clinical impact. Leverage collective genomic intelligence to advance precision medicine, enhance patient care, and lead in healthcare innovation.

Helix Precision Pathway

Utilize Helix's advanced genomic insights to enhance clinical decision-making and improve patient outcomes. Empower your healthcare organization to deliver personalized care at scale.

Helix Clinical Genomics

Unlock comprehensive genomic insights with Helix diagnostics. Simplify genetic testing for your patients while gaining actionable health information.

Helix Genomic Advantage

Harness Genomic Advantage to shift the cost curve and drive growth for health plans. Reduce healthcare spend while improving member outcomes.

Helix GenoSphere

Access curated, longitudinal clinico-genomic cohorts to enhance drug discovery, streamline clinical trials, and drive innovation in precision medicine.

Driving collaboration and partnership across industries

Over 1.5 million

diverse patients committed across 15+ HRN members

Empowering health systems with genomic solutions for precision care

Transforming healthcare delivery and planning with genetic insights, empowering health systems to enhance patient outcomes and drive population health initiatives.

Empowering precision health at an enterprise scale

Helix integrates genomics into everyday healthcare, enabling organizations to implement precision medicine effectively. We transform genetic insights into practical health strategies, improving patient care while optimizing operational efficiency and expanding clinical capabilities.

Accelerate strategic growth

Our solutions enable the expansion of precision medicine capabilities, driving patient engagement, improving health outcomes, and creating new revenue streams through innovative genomic offerings.

Diversify revenue streams

Expand beyond genetic testing to offer personalized health programs, targeted screenings, and data-driven services, creating ongoing patient engagement and value-based care opportunities.

Managing total cost of care

Transform healthcare economics through genomic intelligence. Identify high-risk populations and enable targeted interventions, reducing unnecessary treatments while improving outcomes.

A selection of our partners

Partner perspectives

HealthPartners has launched myGenetics, a population genomics program that will provide important health information to families across Minnesota and surrounding states.
